chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.306 of 2024 National Highway Authority Versus M/s Usman Baloch Enterprises (Pvt.) Ltd. Date Order with signature of Judge For order as to non-prosecution of appeal as office objections have not been complied with. Dated: 18.10.2024 Mr. Imran Ahmed, advocate for appellant. -.-.- Mr. Imran Ahmed Advocate who claims to have signed the Vakalatnama filed available at page 235 of the file now has been instructed to withdraw this High Court Appeal on behalf of the appellant. Although the name of the counsel is not apparent on the Vakalatnama but the signatures on the right side of the same is. Be that as it may, at the request of the counsel the appeal is dismissed as withdrawn along with pending applications. Chief Justice Judge
